title: impatiens noli-tangere var. pallida
intro: Impatiens noli-tangere var. pallida, also known as pale touch-me-not, is a variety of the Impatiens noli-tangere plant, a species of flowering plant native to Asia. The plant's leaves and flowers have been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in China, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antiviral, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. Impatiens noli-tangere var. pallida has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and treating digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
